title: Grilling Techniques
description: Learn how to grill meats and vegetables safely and effectively.

steps.instruction: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season your meat or vegetables with salt and pepper.
Place the food on the grill and cook for the recommended time, turning occasionally.
Use a meat thermometer to check for doneness.
Let the food rest for a few minutes before serving.

safety_tips: Always use tongs to handle food on the grill.
Keep a spray bottle of water nearby for flare-ups.
Never leave the grill unattended while in use.
